languages.text: "Я нахожу диалоги с вами весьма воодушевляющими". {n}Эоганн прищелкивает металлическими пальцами, и с них срывается сноп искр.{/n} "Рекреационное времяпрепровождение в обществе Вольного Торговца оказало благотворное влияние не только на меня, но и на моего коллегу".
languages.translation_comment: Если Манипулус доволен и благодушен: благодарит и уходит через зтм
Если Манипулус доволен и благодушен: благодарит и уходит через зтм

languages.text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."
languages.original_text: "Я нахожу диалоги с вами весьма воодушевляющими". {n}Эоганн прищелкивает металлическими пальцами, и с них срывается сноп искр.{/n} "Рекреационное времяпрепровождение в обществе Вольного Торговца оказало благотворное влияние не только на меня, но и на моего коллегу".

traits.locale_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

"I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

"I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

languages.text: «Encuentro muy edificante dialogar con usted». {n}Eogunn chasquea sus dedos metálicos, haciendo que salten chispas.{/n} «Los ratos de ocio en compañía {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente no solo han ejercido un efecto positivo en mí, sino también en mi colega».
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

traits.locale_text: «Encuentro muy edificante dialogar con usted». {n}Eogunn chasquea sus dedos metálicos, haciendo que salten chispas.{/n} «Los ratos de ocio en compañía {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente no solo han ejercido un efecto positivo en mí, sino también en mi colega».

languages.text: “跟您对话真是让我受益匪浅。”{n}伊奥贡打了个响指，溅起一串火花。{/n}“和行商浪人共度闲暇时光，不只让我受益匪浅，我的同僚亦是如此。”
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

traits.locale_text: “跟您对话真是让我受益匪浅。”{n}伊奥贡打了个响指，溅起一串火花。{/n}“和行商浪人共度闲暇时光，不只让我受益匪浅，我的同僚亦是如此。”

languages.text: « C'est toujours un plaisir de dialoguer avec vous. » {n}Un claquement des doigts métalliques d'Eogunn fait jaillir des étincelles.{/n} « Ce moment de détente en compagnie {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} a eu un effet bénéfique aussi bien sur moi que sur mon collègue. »
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

traits.locale_text: « C'est toujours un plaisir de dialoguer avec vous. » {n}Un claquement des doigts métalliques d'Eogunn fait jaillir des étincelles.{/n} « Ce moment de détente en compagnie {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} a eu un effet bénéfique aussi bien sur moi que sur mon collègue. »

languages.text: "Sizinle diyalog kurmayı oldukça ilham verici buluyorum." {n}Eogunn, metal parmaklarını şıklatarak etrafa kıvılcımlar saçıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir'in eşliğinde geçirilen boş zaman sadece bana değil, meslektaşıma da olumlu etkide bulunuyor."
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

traits.locale_text: "Sizinle diyalog kurmayı oldukça ilham verici buluyorum." {n}Eogunn, metal parmaklarını şıklatarak etrafa kıvılcımlar saçıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir'in eşliğinde geçirilen boş zaman sadece bana değil, meslektaşıma da olumlu etkide bulunuyor."

languages.text: 「あなたとの対話は実に刺激的だと感じています」{n}エオガンが金属の指を鳴らすと、火花が飛び散った。{/n}「ローグトレーダーと共に過ごす余暇は、私のみならず、我が同僚にとっても有益な効果をもたらしているのです」
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたとの対話は実に刺激的だと感じています」{n}エオガンが金属の指を鳴らすと、火花が飛び散った。{/n}「ローグトレーダーと共に過ごす余暇は、私のみならず、我が同僚にとっても有益な効果をもたらしているのです」

languages.text: "Ich finde es recht inspirierend, mit Euch zu sprechen." {n}Eogunn klickt mit seinen metallenen Fingern, aus denen eine Fontäne aus Funken schießt.{/n} "Freie Zeit in Gesellschaft {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} zu verbringen, war nicht nur für mich, sondern auf für meinen Kollegen wohltuend."
languages.original_text: "I find dialoguing with you quite inspiring." {n}Eogunn clicks his metal fingers, shooting out a spray of sparks.{/n} "Leisure time spent in the company of the Rogue Trader has had a beneficial effect not only on me, but on my colleague as well."
